task: Using only the provided embedded packet, compute a priority value per record using: priority = metric1 * metric2 - 0.6 * metric3 + metric4. Rank records in descending priority, but escalate any record breaching the hard threshold (see assumptions) before ranking. Build a retest matrix and a mitigation ranking that includes technical and economic impact assessments. Run the specified sensitivity check (sensitivity_shift_pct) on the priority values and report effects on ranking and recommendations. For each record provide record-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, and mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Produce: (1) emc_susceptibility_matrix.xlsx containing formulas or executable logic and validation checks; (2) test_plan.md describing test procedures, retest matrix, mitigation recommendations, sensitivity methodology and final recommendation table suitable for expert review. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions.
